version_description: The Capo is on the 3rd fret.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Am7[/ch]
Take the shackles off my feet so I can dance[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
I just wanna praise you I just wanna praise you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                                    [ch]Am7[/ch]
You broke the chains now I can lift my hands[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm gonna praise you        I'm gonna praise you[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
In the corners of mind[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am7[/ch]                         [ch]B7[/ch]
I just can't seem to find a reason to believe[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
That I can break free[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause you see I have been down for so long[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am7[/ch]
Feel like the hope is gone[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]B7[/ch]
But as I lift my hands, I understand[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
That I should praise you through my circumstance[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Take the shackles off my feet so I can dance[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
I just wanna praise you I just wanna praise you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]Am7[/ch]
You broke the chains now I can lift my hands[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm gonna praise you        I'm gonna praise you[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
Everything that could go wrong[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
All went wrong at one time[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B7[/ch]
So much pressure fell on me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
I thought I was gonna lose my mind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
But I know you wanna see[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
If I will hold on through these trials[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B7[/ch]
But I need you to lift this load[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause I can't take it anymore[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Take the shackles off my feet so I can dance[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
I just wanna praise you I just wanna praise you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]Am7[/ch]
You broke the chains now I can lift my hands[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm gonna praise you        I'm gonna praise you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
Been through the fire and the rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Bound in every kind of way[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B7[/ch]
But God has broken every chain[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
So let me go right now[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Take the shackles off my feet so I can dance[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]Am7[/ch]
You broke the chains now I can lift my hands[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm gonna praise you        I'm gonna praise you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Take the shackles off my feet so I can dance[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
I just wanna praise you I just wanna praise you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]Am7[/ch]
You broke the chains now I can lift my hands[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm gonna praise you        I'm gonna praise you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Take the shackles off my feet so I can dance[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
I just wanna praise you I just wanna praise you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]Am7[/ch]
You broke the chains now I can lift my hands[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm gonna praise you        I'm gonna praise you[/tab]
